refs.description: Boost.Intrusive's treap_impl class template implementing an intrusive treap with key ordering plus priority-based heap ordering, used to build treap_set and treap_multiset.
Defines the treap_set and treap_multiset container wrappers built on the intrusive treap, exposing priority comparators and unique/equal insertion.
Boost.Intrusive provides bs_set_base_hook and node traits used by the treap node algorithms; the library is the canonical production-grade C++ treap implementation.
